/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/sandhika.dir/sandhika_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sandhika.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o sandhika  libsandhika_app.a libsandhika_dashboard.a libsandhika_tray.a libsandhika_strict.a libsandhika_notifications.a libsandhika_idle.a libsandhika_health.a libsandhika_suppression.a libsandhika_commands.a libsandhika_brightness.a libsandhika_stats.a libsandhika_scheduler.a libsandhika_config.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Charts.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Svg.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 _deps/yaml-cpp-build/libyaml-cpp.a
